info.title: Airline Ticketing API
info.description: REST API for flight inventory management, ticket purchasing, and passenger check-in.

get.summary: Returns all airports in the system.

403.description: Caller does not have the Admin role.

requestBody.description: Airport data: IATA code, name, and city.

400.description: An airport with the same IATA code already exists.

403.description: Caller does not have the Admin role.

get.summary: Retrieves a single airport by its internal GUID.

403.description: Caller does not have the Admin role.

404.description: No airport exists with the given id.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The internal GUID of the airport to update.

403.description: Caller does not have the Admin role.

404.description: No airport exists with the given id.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The internal GUID of the airport to delete.

403.description: Caller does not have the Admin role.

404.description: No airport exists with the given id.

post.summary: Creates multiple airport records in a single batch transaction using insert-ignore semantics.
post.description:
Duplicate IATA codes are never treated as an error. They are silently skipped
and reported in `skippedCodes`. The response is always `200 OK`,
even when every supplied code already existed and `airports` is empty.

requestBody.description:
A non-empty JSON array of airport objects. Each element must include
`code` (IATA), `name`, and `city`.

200.description:
Batch processed successfully. Inspect `airports` for inserted records
and `skippedCodes` for any codes that were ignored.

403.description: Caller does not have the Admin role.

post.summary: Registers a new customer account and returns a signed JWT.
post.description:
Self-registration is restricted to the `Customer` role (FR-01.01).
Admin accounts must be provisioned out-of-band.

requestBody.description: Registration payload containing email and plain-text password.

400.description: Email is already registered or request data is invalid.

post.summary: Authenticates a user with email and password, and returns a signed JWT.
post.description:
Both "email not found" and "wrong password" return 401 with the same
message to prevent user enumeration (FR-01.02).

requestBody.description: Login payload containing email and plain-text password.

post.summary: Performs check-in for a named passenger on a specified flight (FR-06).
post.description:
The endpoint always returns HTTP 200 — business rejections (no ticket found,
already checked in) are communicated via `Status = "Failed"` in the
response body, not via an error status code (FR-06.03). On success,
the next sequential seat number is assigned and persisted.

requestBody.description:
Check-in payload: flight number, departure date, and the passenger's full name
as recorded at booking time.

get.summary:
Searches for available flights matching the given route, date range, and
passenger count (FR-04). Results are paginated (page size fixed at 10).
get.description: All parameters are optional. When the request is sent without any query string the endpoint automatically applies the following defaults: ParameterDefault`DateFrom`Today's UTC date`DateTo`6 months from today (UTC)`AirportFrom`All departure airports (no filter)`AirportTo`All arrival airports (no filter)`NumberOfPeople`1`IsRoundTrip`false`PageNumber`1Date format:`DateFrom` and `DateTo` must be supplied in `yyyy-MM-dd` format (e.g., `2026-06-01`). Any other format returns 400. Flights where `AvailableCapacity < NumberOfPeople` are excluded from results (FR-04.03). Rate limiting (max 3 calls/day per IP) is enforced at the API Gateway level (NFR-02.03) and is not implemented in this controller.

200.description: Search results returned (may be an empty page).

400.description: A date parameter was supplied in an unsupported format (expected `yyyy-MM-dd`).

post.summary: Bulk-imports flights from an uploaded CSV file (FR-03).
post.description:
The CSV must contain these headers (case-insensitive): `FlightNumber`,
`DepartureDate`, `ArrivalDate`, `DurationMinutes`,
`OriginAirportCode`, `DestinationAirportCode`, `TotalCapacity`.
Partial success is supported: valid rows are inserted while invalid rows
accumulate in the `errors` list.

400.description: No file provided or file is empty.

403.description: Caller does not have the Admin role.

get.summary: Returns all flights in the system (admin use).

403.description: Caller does not have the Admin role.

post.summary: Creates a single flight record manually (admin use).

requestBody.description: Flight schedule data including airport codes and capacity.

400.description: Origin or destination airport code not found, or invalid data.

403.description: Caller does not have the Admin role.

get.summary: Retrieves a single flight by its internal GUID.

403.description: Caller does not have the Admin role.

404.description: No flight exists with the given id.

put.summary: Updates mutable fields of an existing flight (admin use).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The internal GUID of the flight to update.

403.description: Caller does not have the Admin role.

404.description: No flight or airport found for the given identifiers.

delete.summary: Permanently deletes a flight record (admin use).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The internal GUID of the flight to delete.

403.description: Caller does not have the Admin role.

404.description: No flight exists with the given id.

get.summary:
Retrieves the paginated passenger manifest for a specific flight (FR-07).
Page size is fixed at 10.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description:
The departure date of the flight in `yyyy-MM-dd` format
(e.g., `2025-06-15`).

400.description: The date string could not be parsed.

403.description: Caller does not have the Admin role.

post.summary: Purchases one or more tickets on a specific flight (FR-05).
post.description:
The `UserId` is extracted securely from the JWT `sub` claim — the
client must never supply it. A single AirlineSystem.Domain.Entities.Booking
groups all passengers under one PNR code. `Flight.AvailableCapacity`
is decremented atomically; optimistic concurrency (RowVersion) prevents
overselling under concurrent load.

requestBody.description:
Booking payload: flight number, departure date, and one or more passenger
full names.

400.description: Invalid request data or flight has already departed.

404.description: No flight found for the given flight number and date.

Bearer.description: Enter your JWT token (without the 'Bearer ' prefix).
